zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Ogle於1379年5月21日出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德奧格爾 卡素時，他的父親Robert de Ogle27歲，母親Joan Heton22歲。他於大約1399年5月21日與Margaret Grey結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他於1435年登記服兵役。他於1435年被列為mp for northumberland。他去世於1435年8月12日在他的家鄉享年56歲，埋葬在英國諾圖波藍德可哈姆聖 安德也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Ogle于1379年5月21日出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德奧格爾 卡素时，他的父亲Robert de Ogle27岁，母亲Joan Heton22岁。他于大约1399年5月21日与Margaret Grey结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他于1435年登记服兵役。他于1435年被列为mp for northumberland。他去世于1435年8月12日在他的家乡享年56岁，埋葬在英国諾圖波藍德可哈姆聖 安德也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Ogle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northumberland and Durham): from Ogle in Whalton, Northumberland. The placename might derive from the Old English personal name Ocga + Old English hyll ‘hill’. This surname has been established in Ireland since the mid 17th century.

variants.name: Ogles
meanings: English (southeastern): variant of Ogle , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Ogle was born on 21 May 1379, in Ogle Castle, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert de Ogle, was 27 and his mother, Joan Heton, was 22. He married Margaret Grey about 21 May 1399. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 7 daughters. He registered for military service in 1435. In 1435, at the age of 56, his occupation is listed as mp for northumberland. He died on 12 August 1435, in his hometown, at the age of 56, and was buried in St Andrew's Church, Hexham, Northumberland, England.

fr.St Andrew's Church, Hexham, Northumberla: St Andrew's Church, Hexham, Northumberland, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Ogle est né le 21 mai 1379, à Ogle Castle, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert de Ogle, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Joan Heton, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Grey environ 21 mai 1399. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 7 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1435. En 1435, à l’âge de 56 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est mp for northumberland. Il est décédé le 12 août 1435, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à St Andrew's Church, Hexham, Northumberland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Ogle am 21. Mai 1379 in Ogle Castle, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Ogle 27 und seine Mutter Joan Heton 22. Er hat um 21. Mai 1399 Margaret Grey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er hat sich 1435 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1435, als er 56 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als mp for northumberland aufgeführt. Er starb am 12. August 1435 im Alter von 56 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in St Andrew's Church, Hexham, Northumberland, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Ogle è nato il il 21 maggio 1379 nel Ogle Castle, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert de Ogle, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Joan Heton, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Grey circa 21 maggio 1399. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 7 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1435. Nel 1435, all'età di 56 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come mp for northumberland. Morì il 12 agosto 1435, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a St Andrew's Church, Hexham, Northumberland, England.

ja.of Ogle Castle, Northumberland, England: イギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドオグル カストル
ja.lifeSummary: Robert Ogleが1379年5月21日にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドオグル カストルで生まれた時，父Robert de Ogleは27歳，母Joan Hetonは22歳であった。約1399年5月21日にMargaret Greyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1435年に兵役登録をした。1435年，56歳の時，職業はmp for northumberlandと記録されている。彼は1435年8月12日に故郷で56歳で死去し，イギリスノースウンバーランドヘクスハムスト アンドリュー'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St Andrew's Church, Hexham, Northumberla: 영국 노르스벌랜드 헤스함 스트 앤드루'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Robert Ogle(이)가 1379년 5월 21일 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 오글 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Ogle(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Heton(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1399년 5월 21일 Margaret Grey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1435년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1435년, 56세의 나이로 그의 직업은 mp for northumberland이었다. 그는 1435년 8월 12일 그의 고향에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르스벌랜드 헤스함 스트 앤드루'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Ogle nasceu em 21 de maio de 1379, em Ogle Castle, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert de Ogle, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Joan Heton, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Grey aproximadamente 21 de maio de 1399. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1435. Em 1435, com 56 anos, sua profissão aparece como mp for northumberland. Ele faleceu em 12 de agosto de 1435, em sua cidade natal, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em St Andrew's Church, Hexham, Northumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.St Andrew's Church, Hexham, Northumberla: ст андрю'с чурч, хексхам, нортумбирланд, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Ogle родился 21 мая 1379 г. в местности огл кастл, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert de Ogle было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Heton, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Grey около 21 мая 1399 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 7 дочерей. В 1435 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1435 году, в возрасте 56 лет, работал по профессии mp for northumberland. Он умер 12 августа 1435 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности ст андрю'с чурч, хексхам, нортумбирланд, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Ogle nació el 21 de mayo de 1379, en Ogle Castle, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert de Ogle, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Joan Heton, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Margaret Grey aproximadamente 21 de mayo de 1399. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 7 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1435. En 1435, a la edad de 56 años, su ocupación registrada era mp for northumberland. Murió el 12 de agosto de 1435, en su pueblo, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en St Andrew's Church, Hexham, Northumberland, Inglaterra.
